LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THE JUDGMENT IS AS TO DEFENDANT MARIA MERINO ONLY, WITHOUT COSTS OF SUIT OR ATTORNEY'S FEES. THE PARTY SHOULD FILE A MEMO OF COSTS AND FILE A MOTION FOR COSTS AND ATTORNEY FEES. AS TO DEFENDANT LUIS CORDOBA, MOVING PARTY TO PROCEED WITH PROVE-UP HEARING (DEPT. 514) JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, NOT REPORTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MERINO, MARIA AKA MARIA O. MERINO $15,615.66 PRINCIPAL, $1,452.90 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,068.56, SEE SCANNED DOC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Pltf To Set Prove-Up Hearing Or Alternatively, To Enter Judgment Pursuant To Pltf'S Default Declaration
Off Calendar Feb-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Michael S. Buennagel, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Redwood Credit Union.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Luis Cordova, aka Luis A. Cordova.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1- 10 dismissed without prejudice.
Witness: John McLaughlin Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $15,615.66
Pre-Judgment Interest: $1,154.20
Attorney's Fees: $1,900.00
Costs: $1,000.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $19,669.86
Judgment signed in open court.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Nov-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Joshua D. Blitt, Esq., from Moore, Brewer, Jones, Tyler & North, 858-626-2880, for Plaintiff and moving party, appearing by telephone

No other Appearance. Tentative Ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF REDWOOD CREDIT UNION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed. Order and Judgment signed in open court. The judgment is as to defendant Maria Merino only, without costs of suit or attorney's fees. The party should file a memo of costs and file a motion for costs and attorney fees.
As to defendant Luis Cordoba, moving party to proceed with prove-up hearing (Dept. 514) Judge: Harold E. Kahn, not reported.
